metadata.description: Paid advertising plugins for Claude Code — strategy, creative generation, multi-platform audit, and closed-loop guided execution.

plugins.name: maxym-ai-ads
plugins.description: Unified paid advertising skill: closed-loop guidance from strategy to launched campaigns. /ads blueprint generates the plan; /ads blueprint-execution walks the user click-by-click through gap-fixing, pixel setup, per-platform campaign build, launch day sequencing, learning-phase observation, and the bi-weekly optimization loop (3× Kill Rule, 20% Scaling, creative fatigue detection). Adaptive output for beginner/intermediate/expert. 32 sub-skills, 15 subagents, 250+ checks across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, YouTube, and Apple Ads.
